
# nextra


---

### ErrorDetailField

ErrorDetailField is a free-form field annotation for an error detail type.

<table style={{width:'100%',borderCollapse:'collapse'}}>
<thead><tr style={{borderBottom:'2px solid rgba(125,125,125,0.3)'}}>
<th style={{textAlign:'left',padding:'8px 12px',fontWeight:600,width:'30%'}}>Name</th>
<th style={{textAlign:'left',padding:'8px 12px',fontWeight:600}}></th>
</tr></thead>
<tbody>
<tr style={{borderBottom:'1px solid rgba(125,125,125,0.15)'}}>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px',verticalAlign:'top',whiteSpace:'nowrap'}}><code>name</code></td>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px'}}><code>string</code><br/><br/></td>
</tr>
<tr style={{borderBottom:'1px solid rgba(125,125,125,0.15)'}}>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px',verticalAlign:'top',whiteSpace:'nowrap'}}><code>value</code></td>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px'}}><code>string</code><br/><br/></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

---

### ErrorDef

ErrorDef documents a single error a method may return.

<table style={{width:'100%',borderCollapse:'collapse'}}>
<thead><tr style={{borderBottom:'2px solid rgba(125,125,125,0.3)'}}>
<th style={{textAlign:'left',padding:'8px 12px',fontWeight:600,width:'30%'}}>Name</th>
<th style={{textAlign:'left',padding:'8px 12px',fontWeight:600}}></th>
</tr></thead>
<tbody>
<tr style={{borderBottom:'1px solid rgba(125,125,125,0.15)'}}>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px',verticalAlign:'top',whiteSpace:'nowrap'}}><code>code</code></td>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px'}}><code>string</code><br/><br/>code is the gRPC status code name, e.g. "NOT_FOUND".</td>
</tr>
<tr style={{borderBottom:'1px solid rgba(125,125,125,0.15)'}}>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px',verticalAlign:'top',whiteSpace:'nowrap'}}><code>description</code></td>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px'}}><code>string</code><br/><br/>description is a human-readable explanation of when this error occurs.</td>
</tr>
<tr style={{borderBottom:'1px solid rgba(125,125,125,0.15)'}}>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px',verticalAlign:'top',whiteSpace:'nowrap'}}><code>detail_type</code></td>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px'}}><code>string</code><br/><br/>detail_type is the fully-qualified proto message name used as the error
detail, e.g. "google.rpc.BadRequest" or "myapp.ValidationError".</td>
</tr>
<tr style={{borderBottom:'1px solid rgba(125,125,125,0.15)'}}>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px',verticalAlign:'top',whiteSpace:'nowrap'}}><code>fields</code></td>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px'}}><code>ErrorDetailField[]</code><br/><br/>fields provides free-form field annotations for the detail type.</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

---

### MethodErrors

MethodErrors lists the errors a method may return.

<table style={{width:'100%',borderCollapse:'collapse'}}>
<thead><tr style={{borderBottom:'2px solid rgba(125,125,125,0.3)'}}>
<th style={{textAlign:'left',padding:'8px 12px',fontWeight:600,width:'30%'}}>Name</th>
<th style={{textAlign:'left',padding:'8px 12px',fontWeight:600}}></th>
</tr></thead>
<tbody>
<tr style={{borderBottom:'1px solid rgba(125,125,125,0.15)'}}>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px',verticalAlign:'top',whiteSpace:'nowrap'}}><code>errors</code></td>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px'}}><code>ErrorDef[]</code><br/><br/></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
